Campers of all abilities will train with an elite coaching staff using a curriculum designed by James Finley, former Head Volleyball Coach at Seattle University. Open to girls and boys, ages 10-18, this volleyball camp is geared toward building confidence, improving skills, and making new friends. From fun drills to friendly games, every moment is designed to help you enjoy the sport you love. Don’t miss out in Auburn—sign up today!
